rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 5/6/25. (No earlier availability.) No courtesy copy of the amended petition was received by the assigned examiner by the deadline of 2/26/25 or even as of 2/28/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JONATHAN L. MAYO
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MICHAEL SPISAK
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/8/25. Examiner's Notes sent on 2/28/25 with the following issues: 1) The following has not been filed: a. Proof of Publication b. Notice of Petition to Administer Estate 2) Declaration of due diligence must be filed as to attempts to locate Decedent's father, who is listed as "unknown". 3) Item 6f is marked, but cousins are listed in Item 8. 4) When second generation or more distant heirs are listed, the deceased ancestors through whom they take (or would have taken) must be named and their relationships to the decedent and dates of deaths need to be stated [Local Rule 14.18C]. 5) Item 7b is incomplete (who decedent was survived by was not marked).
